title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Badla Naag Ka
desc: A fearless man hurts a snake when it tries to attack his lover. Later, he tries to protect himself from the snake which is trying to exact its revenge.

title: Enemy
desc: Rajiv grows envious of his childhood friend, Chozhan, as he is better than him at most things. The frenemies grow apart only to meet under very different circumstances several years later.

title: Chennai vs China
desc: Aravind is a descendant of a martial arts expert, Bodhidharma. He must revive the fighting skills to stop Dong Lee, who comes to India to wage a biological war.

title: Shivam Bhaje
desc: A young loan recovery agent gets entangled in an unexpected accident that turns his life upside down. To avert the crisis, he must find a way to handle the highly destructive threat.

title: Hero The Bullet
desc: Shiva, a young man, is looked down upon by his father due to his irresponsible behaviour. He soon gets embroiled in a tussle with an egoistic gangster who threatens his family.
